TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Gao Renai ising == Gao Renai ising (Inkiris: Dr. Jean (Connan) Murray Landsborough, 1920 miheca 9 folad 1 romi'ad ‚Äď 1993 miheca 11 folad 14 romi'ad), masofoc i inakaay niyaro' no London i Inkiris, halafin ko mihecaan pacakat to Taywan ko kalaising. Da'oc no 'orip Kaemangan a 'orip O kapolongan isi a ising ko mama ni Gao Renai, o kakeridan nio niyaro' cingra i kalaloodan itiya, misa'icel i ka'amisay no London sa'etal isingan ato padamaay a tayal. O fai ci Du Xueyun kaying o naitiraay a singhsi no Canglong fafahiya kawcong i Taynan. O tariktikay nai kaemangan ci Gao Renai, pasi tilidan, iso, likisi, saki radiw ato fangcalay cudad a kimad tadamaan ko pikingkiw. I 1934 miheca, na misawad nai fafahiyan isiyin i London daykako, 2 miheca ko kacitodong to maro'ay ising, ona mipatirengay to isingan. Ikor, mitelek cingra to sintingan ising, ona patilid ci Lan Tapi isingan to saki sinkiw isingan, paca'ofen ni Lan ising a tayra i Redhill miliso' ci Lan Tapi ato mato'asay ningra. Ikor, pasi Inkiris Ciwlo kiwkay misingsi to saka tayra i roma kitakit misinkiw (Hayway sincaw), saka ira ko 3 folad to pinanam to fangcalay cudad atono fa'edetay niyaro' isingan a pinanam. I 1947 miheca 6 folad 14 romi'ad, mararamod i London ci Gao Renai aci Lan Tapi; toya miheca 9 folad, malahakelong cangra tayra i Quanzhou no Fujian i Congko, itira i Huisi isingan ko tayal. Kaitiraan i Quanzhou a to'ek I Quanzhou, salahoday sa ko 'orip nangra tatosa malamod; saka, o romi'ad to ano eca o sowal to maraay to niyaro' no niyah, saka mangalef ko kasasiroma no saki'orip. Roma sato, maledef ko no kafa'edetan a adada ato roma a kadadenga no lifong, tinako kasienawan lalisan, fala' adada, fitoka adadaan. Roma i, itira isingan ira malitemoh ko makalatay no lokedaw madoka'ay; saka, o caay ka fangcal ko kaitiraan no isingan ittiya. Ano matiratira aca i, o matanengay ni Gao Renai kaitini i Huisi isingan i Quanzhou i "O pafelian no Kawas tadamanay sapakaolah". Kaitiraan ho, minanam to itiraay ponka, lekakawa, pinangan itira. Ikor, mafana' to sowal no itiraay, sakanga'ay malalicay. I 1949 miheca 8 folad, micomod ko sofitay i Quanzhousi; i 1951 miheca, mapatangic papiliyas to Quanzhou minokay tayra Inkiris. Minokay tayra Inkiris Ikor nokaitira i Inkiris, midipot cangra maramod to mala'apiay fa'inayan a wawa; ikor no pina mihecaan i, midipot haca to cecay fafahiyan a wawa nai padipotan. Kaitiraan i Canghua Kristokiw isingan I 1952 miheca, alaen nangra maramod koya wawa tayni Taywan, nanoya miteka to misarocod cangra i Canghua Kristokiw isingan ko tayal itiya. Sa'ayaw, midipot ho ci Gao Renai to kaemangay wawa pacarcar sa ko tayal ningra i ising; ikor i, cango'ot a mitongal to tamdaw ko isingan, saka misarocod to ko pidefong to isingan a tayal, saka patireng to fafahiyan a kasofocan (Focanke). Dengan fafahiyan kasofocan isingan ko tayal, mikerid haca cingra to matayalay isingan tayra lotokay yincumin niyaro' ano eca tayra i masapakoyocay lilis no riyar sa'etal, midemak to kapolongan isi sifana' misinting ato mipaisingan ko tayal, mangalef saki emet to kaciwawa no fafahiyan no lalomaan halaka ano eca sapitena' to ekangan adada pisapinang a tayal . Roma i, misafaloco' haca cingra to pa'alowacan kaemangay sifana', itira i papotal ko pilihayan saka macowat ko Lan Tafiti haratengan kiwkay . I 1980 miheca 7 folad 1 romi'ad, misawat to tayal ci Gao Renai minokay tayni Inkiris .
S.PHON: == *ao~u r…ônai isiŇč == *ao~u r…ônai isiŇč (inkiris: …¨~…ģr. *…ôan ( ¶o~unnan) mo~u~urraj …ĺan…¨~…ģsb~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ńß, **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ * **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ), maso~ufo~u ¶ i inakaaj nijaro~u ° no~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un i inkiris, ńßa…ĺafin ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan pa ¶akat to~u tajwan ko~u ka…ĺaisiŇč. …¨~…ģa °o~u ¶ no~u °o~urip ka…ômaŇčan a °o~urip o~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan isi a isiŇč ko~u mama ni *ao~u r…ônai, o~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan nio~u nijaro~u ° ¶iŇčra i ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan itija, misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ i ka °amisaj no~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un sa °…ôta…ĺ isiŇčan ato~u pa…¨~…ģamaaj a taja…ĺ. o~u fai ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u xo~u~u…ôjo~u~un kajiŇč o~u naitiraaj a siŇčńßsi no~u ¶aŇč…ĺo~uŇč fafańßija kaw ¶o~uŇč i tajnan. o~u tariktikaj nai ka…ômaŇčan ¶i *ao~u r…ônai, pasi ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, iso~u, …ĺikisi, saki ra…¨~…ģiw ato~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ a kima…¨~…ģ ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pikiŇčkiw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, na misawa…¨~…ģ nai fafańßijan isijin i …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un …¨~…ģajkako~u, * mińß…ô ¶a ko~u ka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u maro~u °aj isiŇč, o~una mipatir…ôŇčaj to~u isiŇčan. iko~ur, mit…ô…ĺ…ôk ¶iŇčra to~u sintiŇčan isiŇč, o~una pati…ĺi…¨~…ģ ¶i …ĺan tapi isiŇčan to~u saki sinkiw isiŇčan, pa ¶a °o~uf…ôn ni …ĺan isiŇč a tajra i r…ô…¨~…ģńßi…ĺ…ĺ mi…ĺiso~u ° ¶i …ĺan tapi ato~u mato~u °asaj niŇčra. iko~ur, pasi inkiris ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj misiŇčsi to~u saka tajra i ro~uma kitakit misinkiw (ńßajwaj sin ¶aw), saka ira ko~u * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u pinanam to~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ ato~uno~u fa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtaj nijaro~u ° isiŇčan a pinanam. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mararamo~u…¨~…ģ i …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un ¶i *ao~u r…ônai a ¶i …ĺan tapi; to~uja mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺańßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč ¶aŇčra tajra i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u no~u fo~u~ujian i ¶o~uŇčko~u, itira i ńßo~u~uisi isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ. kaitiraan i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u a to~u °…ôk i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u, sa…ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģaj sa ko~u °o~urip naŇčra tato~usa ma…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ; saka, o~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ to~u ano~u …ô ¶a o~u so~uwa…ĺ to~u maraaj to~u nijaro~u ° no~u nijańß, saka maŇča…ĺ…ôf ko~u kasasiro~uma no~u saki °o~urip. ro~uma sato~u, ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf ko~u no~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtan a a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa ato~u ro~uma a ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ôŇča no~u …ĺifo~uŇč, tinako~u kasi…ônawan …ĺa…ĺisan, fa…ĺa ° a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, fito~uka a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaan. ro~uma i, itira isiŇčan ira ma…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u maka…ĺataj no~u …ĺo~uk…ô…¨~…ģaw ma…¨~…ģo~uka °aj; saka, o~u ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u kaitiraan no~u isiŇčan ittija. ano~u matiratira a ¶a i, o~u matan…ôŇčaj ni *ao~u r…ônai kaitini i ńßo~u~uisi isiŇčan i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u i "o~u paf…ô…ĺian no~u kawas ta…¨~…ģamanaj sapakao~u…ĺańß". kaitiraan ńßo~u, minanam to~u itiraaj po~unka, …ĺ…ôkakawa, pinaŇčan itira. iko~ur, mafana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u itiraaj, sakaŇča °aj ma…ĺa…ĺi ¶aj. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u so~ufitaj i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~usi; i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mapataŇči ¶ papi…ĺijas to~u *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u mino~ukaj tajra inkiris. mino~ukaj tajra inkiris iko~ur no~ukaitira i inkiris, mi…¨~…ģipo~ut ¶aŇčra maramo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ma…ĺa °apiaj fa °inajan a wawa; iko~ur no~u pina mińß…ô ¶aan i, mi…¨~…ģipo~ut ńßa ¶a to~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßijan a wawa nai pa…¨~…ģipo~utan. kaitiraan i ¶aŇčńßo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŇčan i **** mińß…ô ¶a, a…ĺa…ôn naŇčra maramo~u…¨~…ģ ko~uja wawa tajni tajwan, nano~uja mit…ôka to~u misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra i ¶aŇčńßo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ itija. sa °ajaw, mi…¨~…ģipo~ut ńßo~u ¶i *ao~u r…ônai to~u ka…ômaŇčaj wawa pa ¶ar ¶ar sa ko~u taja…ĺ niŇčra i isiŇč; iko~ur i, ¶aŇčo~u °o~ut a mito~uŇča…ĺ to~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u isiŇčan, saka misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ôfo~uŇč to~u isiŇčan a taja…ĺ, saka patir…ôŇč to~u fafańßijan a kaso~ufo~u ¶an (fo~u ¶ank…ô). …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan fafańßijan kaso~ufo~u ¶an isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ, mik…ôri…¨~…ģ ńßa ¶a ¶iŇčra to~u mataja…ĺaj isiŇčan tajra …ĺo~uto~ukaj jin ¶o~u~umin nijaro~u ° ano~u …ô ¶a tajra i masapako~ujo~u ¶aj …ĺi…ĺis no~u rijar sa °…ôta…ĺ, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan isi sifana ° misintiŇč ato~u mipaisiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ, maŇča…ĺ…ôf saki …ôm…ôt to~u ka ¶iwawa no~u fafańßijan no~u …ĺa…ĺo~umaan ńßa…ĺaka ano~u …ô ¶a sapit…ôna ° to~u …ôkaŇčan a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa pisapinaŇč a taja…ĺ . ro~uma i, misafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ńßa ¶a ¶iŇčra to~u pa °a…ĺo~uwa ¶an ka…ômaŇčaj sifana °, itira i papo~uta…ĺ ko~u pi…ĺińßajan saka ma ¶o~uwat ko~u …ĺan tafiti ńßarat…ôŇčan kiwkaj . i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, misawat to~u taja…ĺ ¶i *ao~u r…ônai mino~ukaj tajni inkiris .
S.FORM: == Gao Renai ising == Gao Renai ising (Inkiris: Dr. Jean (Connan) Murray Landsborough, 1920 miheca 9 folad 1 romi'ad ‚Äď 1993 miheca 11 folad 14 romi'ad), masofoc i inakaay niyaro' no London i Inkiris, halafin ko mihecaan pacakat to Taywan ko kalaising. Da'oc no 'orip Kaemangan a 'orip O kapolongan isi a ising ko mama ni Gao Renai, o kakeridan nio niyaro' cingra i kalaloodan itiya, misa'icel i ka'amisay no London sa'etal isingan ato padamaay a tayal. O fai ci Du Xueyun kaying o naitiraay a singhsi no Canglong fafahiya kawcong i Taynan. O tariktikay nai kaemangan ci Gao Renai, pasi tilidan, iso, likisi, saki radiw ato fangcalay cudad a kimad tadamaan ko pikingkiw. I 1934 miheca, na misawad nai fafahiyan isiyin i London daykako, 2 miheca ko kacitodong to maro'ay ising, ona mipatirengay to isingan. Ikor, mitelek cingra to sintingan ising, ona patilid ci Lan Tapi isingan to saki sinkiw isingan, paca'ofen ni Lan ising a tayra i Redhill miliso' ci Lan Tapi ato mato'asay ningra. Ikor, pasi Inkiris Ciwlo kiwkay misingsi to saka tayra i roma kitakit misinkiw (Hayway sincaw), saka ira ko 3 folad to pinanam to fangcalay cudad atono fa'edetay niyaro' isingan a pinanam. I 1947 miheca 6 folad 14 romi'ad, mararamod i London ci Gao Renai aci Lan Tapi; toya miheca 9 folad, malahakelong cangra tayra i Quanzhou no Fujian i Congko, itira i Huisi isingan ko tayal. Kaitiraan i Quanzhou a to'ek I Quanzhou, salahoday sa ko 'orip nangra tatosa malamod; saka, o romi'ad to ano eca o sowal to maraay to niyaro' no niyah, saka mangalef ko kasasiroma no saki'orip. Roma sato, maledef ko no kafa'edetan a adada ato roma a kadadenga no lifong, tinako kasienawan lalisan, fala' adada, fitoka adadaan. Roma i, itira isingan ira malitemoh ko makalatay no lokedaw madoka'ay; saka, o caay ka fangcal ko kaitiraan no isingan ittiya. Ano matiratira aca i, o matanengay ni Gao Renai kaitini i Huisi isingan i Quanzhou i "O pafelian no Kawas tadamanay sapakaolah". Kaitiraan ho, minanam to itiraay ponka, lekakawa, pinangan itira. Ikor, mafana' to sowal no itiraay, sakanga'ay malalicay. I 1949 miheca 8 folad, micomod ko sofitay i Quanzhousi; i 1951 miheca, mapatangic papiliyas to Quanzhou minokay tayra Inkiris. Minokay tayra Inkiris Ikor nokaitira i Inkiris, midipot cangra maramod to mala'apiay fa'inayan a wawa; ikor no pina mihecaan i, midipot haca to cecay fafahiyan a wawa nai padipotan. Kaitiraan i Canghua Kristokiw isingan I 1952 miheca, alaen nangra maramod koya wawa tayni Taywan, nanoya miteka to misarocod cangra i Canghua Kristokiw isingan ko tayal itiya. Sa'ayaw, midipot ho ci Gao Renai to kaemangay wawa pacarcar sa ko tayal ningra i ising; ikor i, cango'ot a mitongal to tamdaw ko isingan, saka misarocod to ko pidefong to isingan a tayal, saka patireng to fafahiyan a kasofocan (Focanke). Dengan fafahiyan kasofocan isingan ko tayal, mikerid haca cingra to matayalay isingan tayra lotokay yincumin niyaro' ano eca tayra i masapakoyocay lilis no riyar sa'etal, midemak to kapolongan isi sifana' misinting ato mipaisingan ko tayal, mangalef saki emet to kaciwawa no fafahiyan no lalomaan halaka ano eca sapitena' to ekangan adada pisapinang a tayal . Roma i, misafaloco' haca cingra to pa'alowacan kaemangay sifana', itira i papotal ko pilihayan saka macowat ko Lan Tafiti haratengan kiwkay . I 1980 miheca 7 folad 1 romi'ad, misawat to tayal ci Gao Renai minokay tayni Inkiris .
S.PHON: == *ao~u r…ônai isiŇč == *ao~u r…ônai isiŇč (inkiris: …¨~…ģr. *…ôan ( ¶o~unnan) mo~u~urraj …ĺan…¨~…ģsb~b~vo~uro~uo~u~u*ńß, **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ * **** mińß…ô ¶a ** fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ), maso~ufo~u ¶ i inakaaj nijaro~u ° no~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un i inkiris, ńßa…ĺafin ko~u mińß…ô ¶aan pa ¶akat to~u tajwan ko~u ka…ĺaisiŇč. …¨~…ģa °o~u ¶ no~u °o~urip ka…ômaŇčan a °o~urip o~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan isi a isiŇč ko~u mama ni *ao~u r…ônai, o~u kak…ôri…¨~…ģan nio~u nijaro~u ° ¶iŇčra i ka…ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģan itija, misa °i ¶…ô…ĺ i ka °amisaj no~u …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un sa °…ôta…ĺ isiŇčan ato~u pa…¨~…ģamaaj a taja…ĺ. o~u fai ¶i …¨~…ģo~u~u xo~u~u…ôjo~u~un kajiŇč o~u naitiraaj a siŇčńßsi no~u ¶aŇč…ĺo~uŇč fafańßija kaw ¶o~uŇč i tajnan. o~u tariktikaj nai ka…ômaŇčan ¶i *ao~u r…ônai, pasi ti…ĺi…¨~…ģan, iso~u, …ĺikisi, saki ra…¨~…ģiw ato~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ a kima…¨~…ģ ta…¨~…ģamaan ko~u pikiŇčkiw. i **** mińß…ô ¶a, na misawa…¨~…ģ nai fafańßijan isijin i …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un …¨~…ģajkako~u, * mińß…ô ¶a ko~u ka ¶ito~u…¨~…ģo~uŇč to~u maro~u °aj isiŇč, o~una mipatir…ôŇčaj to~u isiŇčan. iko~ur, mit…ô…ĺ…ôk ¶iŇčra to~u sintiŇčan isiŇč, o~una pati…ĺi…¨~…ģ ¶i …ĺan tapi isiŇčan to~u saki sinkiw isiŇčan, pa ¶a °o~uf…ôn ni …ĺan isiŇč a tajra i r…ô…¨~…ģńßi…ĺ…ĺ mi…ĺiso~u ° ¶i …ĺan tapi ato~u mato~u °asaj niŇčra. iko~ur, pasi inkiris ¶iw…ĺo~u kiwkaj misiŇčsi to~u saka tajra i ro~uma kitakit misinkiw (ńßajwaj sin ¶aw), saka ira ko~u * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ to~u pinanam to~u faŇč ¶a…ĺaj ¶o~u~u…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ ato~uno~u fa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtaj nijaro~u ° isiŇčan a pinanam. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ ** ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, mararamo~u…¨~…ģ i …ĺo~un…¨~…ģo~un ¶i *ao~u r…ônai a ¶i …ĺan tapi; to~uja mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, ma…ĺańßak…ô…ĺo~uŇč ¶aŇčra tajra i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u no~u fo~u~ujian i ¶o~uŇčko~u, itira i ńßo~u~uisi isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ. kaitiraan i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u a to~u °…ôk i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u, sa…ĺańßo~u…¨~…ģaj sa ko~u °o~urip naŇčra tato~usa ma…ĺamo~u…¨~…ģ; saka, o~u ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ to~u ano~u …ô ¶a o~u so~uwa…ĺ to~u maraaj to~u nijaro~u ° no~u nijańß, saka maŇča…ĺ…ôf ko~u kasasiro~uma no~u saki °o~urip. ro~uma sato~u, ma…ĺ…ô…¨~…ģ…ôf ko~u no~u kafa °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôtan a a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa ato~u ro~uma a ka…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģ…ôŇča no~u …ĺifo~uŇč, tinako~u kasi…ônawan …ĺa…ĺisan, fa…ĺa ° a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa, fito~uka a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģaan. ro~uma i, itira isiŇčan ira ma…ĺit…ômo~uńß ko~u maka…ĺataj no~u …ĺo~uk…ô…¨~…ģaw ma…¨~…ģo~uka °aj; saka, o~u ¶aaj ka faŇč ¶a…ĺ ko~u kaitiraan no~u isiŇčan ittija. ano~u matiratira a ¶a i, o~u matan…ôŇčaj ni *ao~u r…ônai kaitini i ńßo~u~uisi isiŇčan i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u i "o~u paf…ô…ĺian no~u kawas ta…¨~…ģamanaj sapakao~u…ĺańß". kaitiraan ńßo~u, minanam to~u itiraaj po~unka, …ĺ…ôkakawa, pinaŇčan itira. iko~ur, mafana ° to~u so~uwa…ĺ no~u itiraaj, sakaŇča °aj ma…ĺa…ĺi ¶aj. i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ, mi ¶o~umo~u…¨~…ģ ko~u so~ufitaj i *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~usi; i **** mińß…ô ¶a, mapataŇči ¶ papi…ĺijas to~u *o~u~uan*ńßo~uo~u~u mino~ukaj tajra inkiris. mino~ukaj tajra inkiris iko~ur no~ukaitira i inkiris, mi…¨~…ģipo~ut ¶aŇčra maramo~u…¨~…ģ to~u ma…ĺa °apiaj fa °inajan a wawa; iko~ur no~u pina mińß…ô ¶aan i, mi…¨~…ģipo~ut ńßa ¶a to~u ¶…ô ¶aj fafańßijan a wawa nai pa…¨~…ģipo~utan. kaitiraan i ¶aŇčńßo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŇčan i **** mińß…ô ¶a, a…ĺa…ôn naŇčra maramo~u…¨~…ģ ko~uja wawa tajni tajwan, nano~uja mit…ôka to~u misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģ ¶aŇčra i ¶aŇčńßo~u~ua kristo~ukiw isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ itija. sa °ajaw, mi…¨~…ģipo~ut ńßo~u ¶i *ao~u r…ônai to~u ka…ômaŇčaj wawa pa ¶ar ¶ar sa ko~u taja…ĺ niŇčra i isiŇč; iko~ur i, ¶aŇčo~u °o~ut a mito~uŇča…ĺ to~u tam…¨~…ģaw ko~u isiŇčan, saka misaro~u ¶o~u…¨~…ģ to~u ko~u pi…¨~…ģ…ôfo~uŇč to~u isiŇčan a taja…ĺ, saka patir…ôŇč to~u fafańßijan a kaso~ufo~u ¶an (fo~u ¶ank…ô). …¨~…ģ…ôŇčan fafańßijan kaso~ufo~u ¶an isiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ, mik…ôri…¨~…ģ ńßa ¶a ¶iŇčra to~u mataja…ĺaj isiŇčan tajra …ĺo~uto~ukaj jin ¶o~u~umin nijaro~u ° ano~u …ô ¶a tajra i masapako~ujo~u ¶aj …ĺi…ĺis no~u rijar sa °…ôta…ĺ, mi…¨~…ģ…ômak to~u kapo~u…ĺo~uŇčan isi sifana ° misintiŇč ato~u mipaisiŇčan ko~u taja…ĺ, maŇča…ĺ…ôf saki …ôm…ôt to~u ka ¶iwawa no~u fafańßijan no~u …ĺa…ĺo~umaan ńßa…ĺaka ano~u …ô ¶a sapit…ôna ° to~u …ôkaŇčan a…¨~…ģa…¨~…ģa pisapinaŇč a taja…ĺ . ro~uma i, misafa…ĺo~u ¶o~u ° ńßa ¶a ¶iŇčra to~u pa °a…ĺo~uwa ¶an ka…ômaŇčaj sifana °, itira i papo~uta…ĺ ko~u pi…ĺińßajan saka ma ¶o~uwat ko~u …ĺan tafiti ńßarat…ôŇčan kiwkaj . i **** mińß…ô ¶a * fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ * ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, misawat to~u taja…ĺ ¶i *ao~u r…ônai mino~ukaj tajni inkiris .
